summary: Tested PortPassLH full-stack app (FastAPI + React + Leaflet + MongoDB). 7/7 backend pytest cases passed and all frontend flows verified via Playwright (map, tabs, mode toggle, status update, simulation, stats with recharts, history list).

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer briefly logs width/height(-1) warning during the view transition; cosmetic only, chart renders correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event hooks (startup/shutdown) -- should migrate to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, low priority).
HAROPA scraper uses sync `requests` inside an async route (`/api/works/refresh`); blocks the event loop briefly. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor.
No index on db.status_history.changed_at and work_id; fine at current data size but add indexes if dataset grows.
GET /api/stats uses ISO-string $gte comparison for events_24h which works because all timestamps are stored with same isoformat shape, but storing native datetime would be safer.
Frontend useEffect for markers never removes markers if a work disappears (not currently possible with seeded list, but worth noting).
seed_data_creation: 13 works auto-seeded by backend on startup; tests do not create extra seed data, only mutate pont-7 and restore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_portpasslh.py cover all required endpoints. HAROPA URL returns 404 by design -> /api/works/refresh returns ok=false reason=fetch_failed updated=0. Frontend uses data-testid for all key elements (map-canvas, tab-map/stats/history, mode-truck-btn/mode-car-btn, distance-label, set-{status}-{id}, badge-{id}, sim-pont-rouge, stats-view, history-view, last-sync). Note: tests mutate pont-7 status temporarily and history entries persist in DB.
